name: Mage Tower
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — a wizard's spire whose wards smother sightlines in haze. Reskin of the Switch. Activate at the end of a Move to raise or lower the ward.
summary: Flip the Mage Tower token. While its ward is raised (dark side showing), a magical haze fouls aim: for each raised Mage Tower in play, ALL players have 1 fewer reroll when Attacking.

effects.text: While the ward is raised, every Attack has -1 reroll.
